title: Reverse Subarray To Maximize Array Value
titleCn: 翻转子数组得到最大的数组值

testcases.input: nums = [2,3,1,5,4] Output: 10 Explanation: By reversing the subarray [3,1,5] the array becomes [2,5,1,3,4] whose value is 10.
testcases.expectedOutput: 10 Explanation: By reversing the subarray [3,1,5] the array becomes [2,5,1,3,4] whose value is 10.
